title: Treasure Hunt
description: There is a $2 \times 2$ box of treasure hidden somewhere in a $5 \times 5$ grid. The rows are numbered from $1$ to $5$, as are the columns, with cell $(1,1)$ being the top left corner of the grid. Your goal is to find the treasure within $5$ queries. You can query a grid cell and ask if there is any part of the treasure chest in that grid cell. After at most $5$ queries, you must output the upper left coordinate of the treasure box.
source: , ICPC, Regionals, North America, North America Qualification Contest, ICPC North America Qualifier 2025, University, MIT, The MIT Programming Contest, 2025-26, MIT Team Contest 1
